## Change

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

List the commands and scenarios used to validate the change.

## Security impact

Describe changes to firewall rules, ports, privileges, installation, or dependencies. Use “Not applicable” when appropriate.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is self-contained in this repository.
- [ ] Documentation was updated where necessary.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, customer data, or internal addresses were included.
- [ ] The change was validated in a supported environment.
- [ ] Approval from `@hdbrsaulobrito` was requested.
